case_title: FREEMAN, DANIEL ROBERT VS DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FREEMAN, DANIEL ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FREEMAN, DANIEL ROBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT'S ACTION VIOLATED THE CC & R'S OF THE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIA- TION, BUT THAT DEFENDANT'S GAINS ON THE SECOND, SUCCESSFUL SALE OF HIS UNIT RESULTED IN NO NET DAMAGES TO HIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
